title: keraselma lathyris
intro: Keraselma lathyris, also known as the wild valerian or valerian, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of keraselma lathyris lie in its roots, which contain valerenic acid, a chemical compound that has been used for centuries to treat various health issues. The health benefits of keraselma lathyris include its ability to aid in sleep, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate symptoms of restlessness and insomnia, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting relaxation and improving sleep quality. Herbal preparations of keraselma lathyris include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
